连接全球行情与策略服务: Connect data, strategy and risk in one UI
统一的实时行情、策略编排与风控监控工作区，面向全球团队开放。: A unified space for real-time quotes, strategy automation and risk monitoring built on Nuxt UI.
在一处完成行情观测、策略回测与风险管控: Orchestrate quotes, backtests and risk in minutes
基于 Nuxt 4 与 Nuxt UI 的响应式终端，支持多语言与暗黑模式，帮助: A Nuxt 4 experience with Tailwind-powered components, multi-language support and responsive theming for trading teams.
连接十余家主流交易所的 WebSocket，实时同轴推送高频报价数据。: WebSocket bridges to leading exchanges keep quote updates flowing in real time.
通过可视化条件与 Nuxt 服务器任务组合，秒级触发风控策略。: Compose nuanced guardrails with Nuxt server tasks and visual conditions.
提供 2FA、令牌隔离与审计日志，满足团队级别的安全要求。: 2FA, scoped tokens and audit logs keep every deployment compliant.
接入 TradingView Chart 组件，秒级渲染蜡烛图。: TradingView chart component embedded with reactive props.
SSR + 客户端缓存，保证接口往返低于 50ms。: SSR + client cache keep APIs under 50ms.
完整的 i18n 配置，支持多语种动态切换。: i18n wiring for instant locale switching.
color-mode 统一处理深浅色与系统偏好。: Color mode syncs with OS preferences.
HTTP 封装默认读取 runtimeConfig，实现多环境切换。: HTTP layer now reads runtimeConfig to swap environments safely.
新增首页与登录文案，四种语言一次就绪。: Home & login copy translated into four locales.
Nuxt UI 组件库替换 Element Plus，支持暗黑模式。: Nuxt UI replaces Element Plus with full dark-mode support.
登录标题: Sign in to the control room
使用受信账号进入您的多市场工作区。: Use your trusted credentials to enter the global workspace.
我们会对敏感字段进行端到端加密: Sensitive fields are encrypted end to end
登录失败，请稍后重试: Sign in failed, please try again

合约页说明: Use this page for contract trading, risk parameters, margin modes, and derivatives market panels.
当前已完成路由占位，后续可继续接入真实业务内容。: The route is now in place and ready for real business content later.
按交易所与计价币筛选并搜索交易对，后续接入实时行情与深度数据。: Filter and search pairs by exchange and quote currency. Live quote and depth feeds will be wired in next.
先用静态数据占位，后续接 WebSocket 实时更新。: Seeded with static rows for now; will switch to WebSocket-driven updates.
